title: Proud Mary
why_this_song: Proud Mary by Creedence Clearwater Revival (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 21 times; first heard in: "Rollin', rollin', rollin' on the river"

Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Big wheels keep on turnin'"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Big wheels keep on turnin'"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

lines: Rollin', rollin', rollin' on the river
Cleaned a lot of plates in Memphis
Pumped a lot of pain down in New Orleans
But I never saw the good side of the city
Rollin', rollin', rollin' on the river

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rollin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rollin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "river" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "river" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Left for a job in the city
Cleaned a lot of plates in Memphis
People on the river, happy to give

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Workin' for the man ev'ry night and day
Rollin', rollin', rollin' on the river

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Proud Mary" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Proud Mary" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Proud Mary" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Proud Mary" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Proud Mary" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Proud Mary"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
